overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a torch-lit underground tunnel and emerging into a snowy mountain fortress. The clip transitions from dark enclosed spaces to an open exterior with dramatic mountain vistas.

scene_state.functional_zone: torch-lit underground tunnel with wooden support beams

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the torch-lit tunnel toward the distant bright exit

entered.detail: thick wooden pillars supporting the tunnel ceiling
rough-hewn stone walls of the underground passage
iron lanterns with warm orange flames hanging from chains
bright white light visible at the far end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow torch-lit tunnel with wooden support beams and rough stone walls. Warm orange lantern light illuminates the cobblestone path as he moves steadily toward the bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain fortress courtyard and walkway with battlements

events.description: exiting the dark tunnel into the open snowy fortress exterior
transitioning from artificial torchlight to natural daylight
character turns left to look at the mountain vista before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking through the fortress courtyard past an NPC and along the wall overlooking snowy peaks

notable_agents.action: standing guard by a burning brazier wearing red clothing and horned helmet

entered.detail: large stone archway marking the tunnel exit
character in red robes with horned helmet standing near a fire
metal fire pit with flames providing warmth near the exit
crenellated stone walls lining the fortress walkway
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance
wooden planks forming a path along the fortress wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the tunnel into a snowy mountain fortress at dusk. He passes an NPC in red robes standing by a burning brazier, then walks along stone battlements overlooking vast snow-covered peaks. The camera turns to admire the mountain vista before continuing along the wooden walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic warmth of a subterranean passage into the expansive chill of a mountain fortress at dusk. It begins with Geralt walking through a narrow tunnel of rough stone and wooden beams, where orange lantern light flickers across a cobblestone path leading toward a bright distant exit. As he emerges from the tunnel, the enclosed space opens into a snowy exterior where he passes a figure in red robes standing beside a burning brazier. The scene then shifts to the stone battlements, moving along a wooden walkway that overlooks a vast landscape of snow-covered peaks. Finally, the camera turns to capture the dramatic mountain vista before continuing its steady progression through the fortress.
